'''Verdanth''' was a rainforest [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Verdanth system/Legends|Verdanth system]]. It was located on a strategic position on the [[Duros Space Run]] and the [[Sanrafsix Corridor]] and near the intersection of the [[Grumani sector/Legends|Grumani]], [[Sanbra sector/Legends|Sanbra]], and [[Bon'nyuw-Luq sector/Legends|Bon'nyuw-Luq]] [[Sector/Legends|sectors]]. Verdanth's indigenous [[Species/Legends|species]] included [[rimebat]]s. During the [[New Sith Wars]], the planet was frequently fought over by [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Sith Lord/Legends|Lords]], while, during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] tried and failed to capture [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] on the world.

==History==
===New Sith Wars===
[[File:Vannar_Treece.jpg|thumb|left|150px|[[Vannar Treece]], who briefly described Verdanth in his report.]]
During the [[Republic Dark Age]], the world was home to colonists of several [[Species/Legends|species]], including [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]],<ref name="Knight Errant" /> and was frequently fought over by petty princelings and would-be [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Sith Lord/Legends|Lords]], with the title "[[Conqueror of Verdanth]]" passing to a new Lord every few years. It was later estimated by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Vannar Treece]] that Verdanth had been under the control of seventeen different self-declared Sith Lords since approximately [[1032 BBY/Legends|1032 BBY]].<ref name="KEG" />

During this time period, [[Narsk Ka'hane]] was raised on Verdanth by his [[Narsk Ka'hane's aunt|aunt]] and served the various Sith Lords as a slave. It was during one of his assignments, harvesting [[rimebat]]s in the jungle world's caverns, that Ka'hane first weared a [[Stealth suit/Legends|stealth suit]].<ref name="Knight Errant" />

Shortly before the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]-led [[Operation Influx]], Treece compiled a report to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Genarra]] on the worlds of the Grumani and neighboring sectors. In the report, Treece included a brief description of Verdanth and noted that the jungles of the planet were still resisting the colonization efforts of the transplanted refugees.<ref name="KEG" />

===Galactic Civil War===
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] [[3 ABY/Legends|one thousand and thirty-five]] [[Standard year/Legends|years]] later, [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] used a seemingly crashed [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] as bait to capture [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], but Luke was rescued by [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]].<ref name="The Final Trap">"[[The Final Trap]]"</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Although the [[The Knight Errant Gazetteer|''The ''Knight Errant'' Gazetteer'']] states that Verdanth is located on the [[Sanrafsix Corridor]], the [[:File:Grumani sector.jpg|map]] of Grumani sector accompanying the document places it on the [[Duros Space Run]].<ref name="KEG" />
